data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX To Undertake Starship's 8th Test Flight On Friday
data.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said on Sunday that the next test flight of its Starship launch vehicle will be on Friday or Feb. 28.

data.title: Nvidia Set For 'Clear Beat And Raise Special' As AI Demand Surges, Says Dan Ives
data.description: Nvidia is poised to deliver another strong earnings performance this week, according to Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives.

data.title: Elon Musk-Led Tesla's Supercharger Vandalized With Nazi Symbols, EV Giant Says It 'Will Press Charges'
data.description: Tesla is facing escalating brand challenges as vandals targeted a Supercharger station with Nazi symbols and hate speech.

data.title: Tesla To Launch Refreshed Model S, X Later This Year, Says Senior Exec
data.description: EV giant Tesla Inc will refresh its more premium car offerings- the Model S and Model X- later this year, senior company executive Lars Moravy said in an interview published on Sunday.

data.title: Microsoft Pulls Plug On AI Data Center Leases, Says Analyst: Oversupply Situation Likely
data.description: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) has reportedly begun to cancel leases for a significant portion of its AI data center capacity in the United States, as per a recent report by TD Cowen.
